An individual church member. Stores name: Mshiriki binafsi wa kanisa. Huhifadhi jina, tarehe ya kuzaliwa, barua pepe binafsi, na simu ya mkononi.

Donations and giving records are tracked: Rekodi za sadaka na michango zinafuatiliwa kwa kiwango cha familia. Ikiwa unapanga kurekodi michango ya mtu anayeishi peke yake, tengeneza familia ya mtu mmoja kwake.
